title: Senior Software Engineer - Intel India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Intel India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Intel India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Jodhpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Intel India:
Intel India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Intel India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
